creator: steve@energistic.com
text:
Looks good to me. Thank you for your work on this.

Note that ports/112846 is a duplicate of this PR.

On Tue, May 22, 2007 at 07:40:09AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/mediaproxy,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/112849 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112849
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
